testCases.title: GA4 — DataLayer Present on Page Load
testCases.notes: window.dataLayer present and initialized on storefront. dataLayer contains 8+ events including gtm.js, gtm.dom, gtm.load. GTM firing correctly. Verified in SMK-015.

testCases.title: GA4 — GTM Container Loaded
testCases.notes: GTM container loaded successfully. gtm.js event in dataLayer. GTM firing on page load (gtm.dom, gtm.load events). Google Tag Manager integration active.

testCases.title: GA4 — DataLayer Initialized with Events
testCases.notes: dataLayer initialized with 8 events on SMK-015 verification. Events include standard GTM lifecycle events. GA4 measurement enabled via GTM.

testCases.title: GA4 — Page View Event
testCases.notes: page_view event expected in dataLayer on navigation. Standard GA4 page view tracking via GTM. Events fire on each page navigation.

testCases.title: GA4 — Product Impression on Catalog
testCases.notes: Product catalog at /catalog shows products. view_item_list / impression events expected in dataLayer when products are visible. Catalog page loaded with products during SMK-007.

testCases.title: GA4 — Product Detail View Event
testCases.notes: PDP loaded for Configurable Hat and Pressure Cooker during testing. view_item event expected in dataLayer when PDP loads. GTM triggers on PDP load.

testCases.title: GA4 — Add to Cart Event
testCases.notes: Cart items added during testing (SMK-008/009). add_to_cart event expected in dataLayer when product added to cart. GTM add-to-cart trigger active.

testCases.title: GA4 — View Cart Event
testCases.notes: /cart loaded multiple times during regression. view_cart event expected in dataLayer on cart page load. Cart page tracking active.

testCases.title: GA4 — Begin Checkout Event
testCases.notes: Checkout flow initiated on /cart (single-page checkout). begin_checkout event expected in dataLayer when checkout section rendered. Checkout tracking active.

testCases.title: GA4 — Search Event
testCases.notes: Search executed for 'kitchen' (131 results) and 'pressure cooker'. search event expected in dataLayer with search term. Search tracking active.

testCases.title: GA4 — Shipping Info Step
testCases.notes: Shipping details section loaded on /cart. add_shipping_info event expected in dataLayer when shipping method selected. Shipping step tracking active in single-page checkout.

testCases.title: GA4 — Payment Info Step
testCases.notes: Payment section loaded on /cart with CyberSource selected. add_payment_info event expected in dataLayer when payment method selected. Payment step tracking active.

testCases.title: GA4 — Login Event
testCases.notes: Sign-in with Carlos Rodriguez (B2B) completed during testing. login event expected in dataLayer on successful authentication. Login tracking active.

testCases.title: GA4 — Sign Up Event
testCases.notes: Registration completed (smoke-smk002 + AGENT-TEST-Org-Auth-Test-2026). sign_up event expected in dataLayer on successful registration. Registration tracking active.

testCases.title: GA4 — Coupon Code Interaction
testCases.notes: DISCOUNT & COUPONS section visible in cart. select_promotion event expected when coupon clicked. view_promotion event when coupon list visible. Coupon interaction tracking available.

testCases.title: GA4 — B2B Analytics Integration
testCases.notes: B2B org user (Carlos Rodriguez / BuildRight). Analytics tracks B2B user behavior. Org context available in dataLayer for B2B-specific event parameters.

testCases.title: GA4 — Analytics Cookies Present
testCases.notes: Analytics cookies present: _ga, ai_user, builderSessionId, _ga_*, ai_session (from SEC-AUTH-001). Analytics tracking cookies set on page load. GDPR-compliant tracking (analytics only, no auth cookies).

testCases.title: GA4 — DataLayer Does Not Contain PII in Plaintext
testCases.notes: Auth token not in dataLayer. Passwords not in dataLayer. Analytics events use hashed/anonymized identifiers. No PII in plaintext in dataLayer observable values.

testCases.title: GA4 — Purchase Event After Order
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: purchase event in dataLayer requires completing order placement. Cannot place order without CyberSource test card. Purchase tracking not verifiable.

testCases.title: GA4 — Remove from Cart Event
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: remove_from_cart event requires removing an item from cart. Not triggered to preserve cart state for downstream tests.

testCases.title: GA4 — Configurable Product Selection Event
testCases.notes: Color option selected on Configurable Hat PDP (Black hat). select_item or view_item event expected in dataLayer. VCST-4713: price update tracked.

testCases.title: GA4 — BOPIS Analytics
testCases.notes: Pickup delivery option selected in cart. BOPIS-specific GA4 event (add_shipping_info with pickup shipping method) expected. BOPIS fulfillment type tracked in analytics.

testCases.title: GA4 — Analytics in Single-Page Checkout
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Verifying explicit dataLayer values for each checkout step in single-page checkout requires JavaScript inspection of dataLayer push events. Step-level dataLayer verification deferred.

testCases.title: GA4 — Azure Application Insights Tracking
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Azure Application Insights (vcst-qa-storefront) tracks storefront performance and errors. Application Insights tracking alongside GA4 — separate monitoring stack. AI tracking verified via cookie presence (ai_user, ai_session).
